hindu.tithi.8.name: Shukla Ashtami
hindu.tithi.9.name: Shukla Navami
iching.hex.1.image: le Ciel sur heaven — le sage strengthens himself ceaselessly
iching.hex.1.judgment: Pure creative force initiates all things
iching.hex.1.name: Le Créateur
iching.hex.10.image: le Ciel au-dessus de the lake — le sage distinguishes high and low
iching.hex.10.judgment: Treading upon the tiger's tail with care and propriety brings success
iching.hex.10.name: La Marche
iching.hex.11.image: la Terre au-dessus de heaven — le souverain channels the way of heaven for the people
iching.hex.11.judgment: Heaven and earth unite — the small departs, the great approaches
iching.hex.11.name: La Paix
iching.hex.12.image: le Ciel au-dessus de earth — le sage withdraws into inner worth
iching.hex.12.judgment: Heaven and earth do not communicate — decline and obstruction
iching.hex.12.name: La Stagnation
iching.hex.13.image: le Ciel with fire — le sage organizes clans and distinguishes things
iching.hex.13.judgment: True fellowship among people through shared principles
iching.hex.13.name: La Communauté
iching.hex.14.image: le Feu au-dessus de heaven — le sage curbs evil and promotes good
iching.hex.14.judgment: Fire in heaven — supreme success through understanding what is great
iching.hex.14.name: Le Grand Avoir
iching.hex.15.image: la Montagne au sein de earth — le sage reduces what is too much and increases what is too little
iching.hex.15.judgment: Modesty creates success — the mountain within the earth
iching.hex.15.name: La Modestie
iching.hex.16.image: le Tonnerre au-dessus de earth — les anciens rois made music to honor merit
iching.hex.16.judgment: Thunder over earth — enthusiasm moves all things
iching.hex.16.name: L'Enthousiasme
iching.hex.17.image: le Tonnerre au sein de the lake — le sage rests at nightfall
iching.hex.17.judgment: Adapting to the time and following with sincerity brings success
iching.hex.17.name: La Suite
iching.hex.18.image: le Vent at the foot of the mountain — le sage stirs up the people and nourishes virtue
iching.hex.18.judgment: What has been corrupted through neglect can be restored through effort
iching.hex.18.name: Le Travail sur le Corrompu
iching.hex.19.image: la Terre au-dessus de the lake — le sage teaches and shelters without limit
iching.hex.19.judgment: The great approaches with willing condescension toward the small
iching.hex.19.name: L'Approche
iching.hex.2.image: la Terre sur earth — le sage supports all beings with broad virtue
iching.hex.2.judgment: Pure receptive force nourishes all things
iching.hex.2.name: Le Réceptif
iching.hex.20.image: le Vent au-dessus de earth — les anciens rois visited the regions to teach the people
iching.hex.20.judgment: The sage gazes upon the divine meaning beneath appearances
iching.hex.20.name: La Contemplation
iching.hex.21.image: le Tonnerre and lightning — les anciens rois enforced the laws with clarity
iching.hex.21.judgment: Energetic biting through obstacles restores unity
iching.hex.21.name: Mordre au Travers
iching.hex.22.image: le Feu at the foot of the mountain — le sage brightens gau-dessus denance without daring to judge
iching.hex.22.judgment: Beauty adorns form but substance must remain within
iching.hex.22.name: La Grâce
iching.hex.23.image: la Montagne resting on the earth — le souverain strengthens the foundation of the people
iching.hex.23.judgment: The dark forces peel away what has been built — accept and wait
iching.hex.23.name: L'Éclatement
iching.hex.24.image: le Tonnerre au sein de the earth — les anciens rois closed the passes at solstice
iching.hex.24.judgment: After decay, the turning point — the one light returns below
iching.hex.24.name: Le Retour
iching.hex.25.image: le Tonnerre under heaven — les anciens rois nourished all beings in accord with the season
iching.hex.25.judgment: Acting from genuine nature without ulterior motive brings success
iching.hex.25.name: L'Innocence
iching.hex.26.image: le Ciel au sein de the mountain — le sage studies the ancients to cultivate character
iching.hex.26.judgment: Firm restraint of great creative power builds reserves of strength
iching.hex.26.name: Le Grand Apprivoisement
iching.hex.27.image: le Tonnerre at the foot of the mountain — le sage is careful with words and temperate in eating
iching.hex.27.judgment: Attending to what nourishes body and mind brings good fortune
iching.hex.27.name: La Nourriture
iching.hex.28.image: The lake rises au-dessus de the trees — le sage stands alone without fear
iching.hex.28.judgment: The ridgepole bends — extraordinary measures are needed in extraordinary times
iching.hex.28.name: Le Grand Excès
iching.hex.29.image: l'Eau flows on and reaches the goal — le sage teaches through repeated practice
iching.hex.29.judgment: Repeated danger teaches sincerity of heart — flow like water
iching.hex.29.name: L'Insondable
iching.hex.3.image: le Tonnerre and rain — le sage brings order from chaos
iching.hex.3.judgment: Birth pangs of new endeavors require perseverance
iching.hex.3.name: La Difficulté Initiale
iching.hex.30.image: le Feu doubled produces great brightness — le sage illuminates all regions
iching.hex.30.judgment: Luminous clarity depends on something to cling to — accept dependence
iching.hex.30.name: Ce Qui S'Attache
iching.hex.31.image: The lake sur the mountain — le sage receives others with openness
iching.hex.31.judgment: Mutual attraction between the yielding and the firm brings union
iching.hex.31.name: L'Influence
iching.hex.32.image: le Tonnerre and wind reinforce each other — le sage stands firm in his direction
iching.hex.32.judgment: Enduring consistency in one's way of life brings success
iching.hex.32.name: La Durée
iching.hex.33.image: la Montagne under heaven — le sage keeps the inferior at a distance with dignity
iching.hex.33.judgment: Strategic withdrawal before the advancing dark preserves strength
iching.hex.33.name: La Retraite
iching.hex.34.image: le Tonnerre au-dessus de heaven — le sage treads no path contrary to propriety
iching.hex.34.judgment: Great power combined with righteousness moves heaven and earth
iching.hex.34.name: La Grande Puissance
iching.hex.35.image: The sun rises au-dessus de the earth — le sage brightens his bright virtue
iching.hex.35.judgment: The bright sun rises over the earth — willing service brings rapid advance
iching.hex.35.name: Le Progrès
iching.hex.36.image: The sun sinks into the earth — le sage veils his brightness in dealings with the multitude
iching.hex.36.judgment: In times of darkness the sage conceals his light to endure adversity
iching.hex.36.name: L'Obscurcissement de la Lumière
iching.hex.37.image: le Vent comes from fire — le sage speaks with substance and acts with consistency
iching.hex.37.judgment: The well-ordered family is the foundation of all social order
iching.hex.37.name: La Famille
iching.hex.38.image: le Feu au-dessus de the lake — le sage remains individual au sein de community
iching.hex.38.judgment: Despite outward opposition, underlying affinity makes small things possible
iching.hex.38.name: L'Opposition
iching.hex.39.image: l'Eau on the mountain — le sage turns attention to self-improvement
iching.hex.39.judgment: Facing an abyss before and a mountain behind — turn inward and gather allies
iching.hex.39.name: L'Obstacle
iching.hex.4.image: Spring at the foot of the mountain — le sage cultivates character
iching.hex.4.judgment: The young fool seeks the teacher, not the teacher the fool
iching.hex.4.name: La Folie Juvénile
iching.hex.40.image: le Tonnerre and rain arise — le sage pardons errors and forgives transgressions
iching.hex.40.judgment: When release from tension comes, return to normalcy swiftly
iching.hex.40.name: La Libération
iching.hex.41.image: The lake at the foot of the mountain — le sage controls anger and restrains instincts
iching.hex.41.judgment: Decrease of the lower enriches the higher — sincerity in simplicity brings blessings
iching.hex.41.name: La Diminution
iching.hex.42.image: le Vent and thunder strengthen each other — le sage moves toward good and corrects faults
iching.hex.42.judgment: The ruler decreases self to increase the people — generous sacrifice brings benefit
iching.hex.42.name: L'Augmentation
iching.hex.43.image: The lake rises to heaven — le sage distributes blessings to those below
iching.hex.43.judgment: Resolute action brings dark matters to light — proclaim the danger openly
iching.hex.43.name: La Percée
iching.hex.44.image: le Vent under heaven — le souverain proclaims his commands to the four quarters
iching.hex.44.judgment: The dark principle advances from below — recognize and contain it early
iching.hex.44.name: Venir à la Rencontre
iching.hex.45.image: The lake au-dessus de the earth — le sage renews his weapons to meet the unforeseen
iching.hex.45.judgment: People gather around a strong leader — prepare for the unexpected
iching.hex.45.name: Le Rassemblement
iching.hex.46.image: Within the earth wood grows — le sage builds great things from small beginnings
iching.hex.46.judgment: Gentle effort directed steadily upward meets with supreme success
iching.hex.46.name: La Poussée vers le Haut
iching.hex.47.image: The lake has no water — le sage risks his life to fulfill his purpose
iching.hex.47.judgment: Exhaustion of resources tests character — the sage stakes his life on following his will
iching.hex.47.name: L'Accablement
iching.hex.48.image: l'Eau au-dessus de wood — le sage encourages the people and counsels mutual aid
iching.hex.48.judgment: The well nourishes all without being exhausted — seek the unchanging source
iching.hex.48.name: Le Puits
iching.hex.49.image: le Feu in the lake — le sage orders the calendar and clarifies the seasons
iching.hex.49.judgment: When the time is ripe, revolutionary change commands belief
iching.hex.49.name: La Révolution
iching.hex.5.image: Clouds rise to heaven — le sage eats, drinks, and is joyful
iching.hex.5.judgment: Sincerity and patience lead to crossing the great water
iching.hex.5.name: L'Attente
iching.hex.50.image: le Feu au-dessus de wood — le sage consolidates destiny by making his position correct
iching.hex.50.judgment: The sacred vessel transforms raw material into nourishment for the wise
iching.hex.50.name: Le Chaudron
iching.hex.51.image: Repeated thunder — le sage sets things in order through fearful reflection
iching.hex.51.judgment: Shock and thunder bring fear, then laughter — the sage examines himself through awe
iching.hex.51.name: L'Éveilleur
iching.hex.52.image: la Montagnes joined together — le sage does not permit thoughts to go beyond the situation
iching.hex.52.judgment: Stillness of the mountain — the sage quiets the mind and does not go beyond his position
iching.hex.52.name: L'Immobilisation
iching.hex.53.image: A tree on the mountain grows slowly — le sage abides in dignity and virtue
iching.hex.53.judgment: Gradual development like a tree on the mountain brings lasting results
iching.hex.53.name: Le Développement Graduel
iching.hex.54.image: le Tonnerre au-dessus de the lake — le sage understands the transitory in light of eternity
iching.hex.54.judgment: The younger sister follows the elder — knowing one's place brings eventual good
iching.hex.54.name: L'Épousée
iching.hex.55.image: le Tonnerre and lightning together — le sage decides lawsuits and carries out punishments
iching.hex.55.judgment: Fullness and abundance at the zenith — act now for the sun must set
iching.hex.55.name: L'Abondance
iching.hex.56.image: le Feu on the mountain — le sage is clear and cautious in applying penalties
iching.hex.56.judgment: The traveler succeeds through smallness and adaptability, not grandeur
iching.hex.56.name: Le Voyageur
iching.hex.57.image: le Vents following one another — le sage spreads his commands and carries out his affairs
iching.hex.57.judgment: Persistent gentle penetration achieves what aggression cannot
iching.hex.57.name: Le Doux
iching.hex.58.image: le Lacs joined together — le sage joins with friends for discussion and practice
iching.hex.58.judgment: True joy comes from inner firmness expressed with outward gentleness
iching.hex.58.name: Le Joyeux
iching.hex.59.image: le Vent drives au-dessus de the water — les anciens rois made offerings and built temples
iching.hex.59.judgment: Wind over water disperses rigid separations — use gentle means to dissolve barriers
iching.hex.59.name: La Dissolution
iching.hex.6.image: le Ciel and water move apart — le sage plans before acting
iching.hex.6.judgment: Inner truth and caution resolve disagreement
iching.hex.6.name: Le Conflit
iching.hex.60.image: l'Eau au-dessus de the lake — le sage creates number and measure to examine virtue and conduct
iching.hex.60.judgment: Proper limits bring structure — but bitter limitations should not be held to
iching.hex.60.name: La Limitation
iching.hex.61.image: le Vent au-dessus de the lake — le sage deliberates sur punishments and delays execution
iching.hex.61.judgment: Inner truth reaches even pigs and fish — sincerity moves all beings
iching.hex.61.name: La Vérité Intérieure
iching.hex.62.image: le Tonnerre on the mountain — le sage is reverent in conduct and sorrowful in mourning
iching.hex.62.judgment: In small matters excess is permissible — the flying bird leaves its song behind
iching.hex.62.name: Le Petit Excès
iching.hex.63.image: l'Eau au-dessus de fire — le sage reflects on misfortune and prepares against it
iching.hex.63.judgment: All lines in their proper place — success, but vigilance against disorder
iching.hex.63.name: Après l'Accomplissement
iching.hex.64.image: le Feu au-dessus de water — le sage carefully distinguishes things and puts them in their places
iching.hex.64.judgment: The final crossing is not yet accomplished — careful discernment of forces is needed
iching.hex.64.name: Avant l'Accomplissement
iching.hex.7.image: l'Eau au sein de the earth — le sage nurtures the people and gathers strength
iching.hex.7.judgment: Discipline and just leadership organize the people
iching.hex.7.name: L'Armée
iching.hex.8.image: l'Eau sur the earth — les anciens rois established their states
iching.hex.8.judgment: Union requires a central figure of sincerity
iching.hex.8.name: La Solidarité
iching.hex.9.image: le Vent au-dessus de heaven — le sage refines outward form and virtue
iching.hex.9.judgment: Gentle restraint achieves what force cannot
iching.hex.9.name: Le Petit Apprivoisement
islamic.month.1.brief: Mois sacré de deuil et de souvenir
islamic.month.1.name: Muharram
islamic.month.10.brief: Mois de célébration et de jeûne volontaire
islamic.month.10.event: Aïd al-Fitr (1er) -- Fête de la Rupture du Jeûne
islamic.month.10.name: Shawwal
islamic.month.11.brief: Mois sacré de trêve et de préparation au Hajj
islamic.month.11.name: Dhul Qa'dah
islamic.month.12.brief: Mois sacré de pèlerinage et de sacrifice
islamic.month.12.event: Hajj (8-12), Aïd al-Adha (10) -- Fête du Sacrifice
islamic.month.12.name: Dhul Hijjah
islamic.month.2.brief: Mois de voyage -- traditionnellement considéré comme difficile
islamic.month.2.name: Safar
islamic.month.3.brief: Mois de joie et de célébration prophétique
islamic.month.3.name: Rabi al-Awwal
islamic.month.3.significance: Mois de la naissance du Prophète
islamic.month.4.brief: Mois tranquille de réflexion et de croissance
islamic.month.4.name: Rabi al-Thani
islamic.month.4.significance: Mois de la continuation du printemps
islamic.month.5.name: Jumada al-Ula
islamic.month.6.name: Jumada al-Thani
islamic.month.7.name: Rajab
islamic.month.8.name: Sha'ban
islamic.month.9.brief: Mois de jeûne, de révélation et de renouveau spirituel
islamic.month.9.name: Ramadan
islamic.month.9.significance: Mois de la chaleur brûlante/du jeûne
islamic.prayer.0.meaning: Éveil -- commencer avant que le monde ne s'éveille
islamic.prayer.0.name: Fajr
islamic.prayer.1.meaning: Souvenir -- pause au sommet de la journée
islamic.prayer.1.name: Dhuhr
islamic.prayer.1.time_desc: Milieu de la journée, après le zénith
islamic.prayer.2.meaning: Réflexion -- conscience du temps qui passe
islamic.prayer.2.name: Asr
islamic.prayer.3.meaning: Gratitude -- marquer l'achèvement de la journée
islamic.prayer.3.name: Maghrib
islamic.prayer.3.time_desc: Juste après le coucher du soleil
islamic.prayer.4.name: Isha
islamic.prayer.4.time_desc: Nuit, après la disparition du crépuscule
islamic.tpl.detail_sacred: C'est l'un des quatre mois sacrés.
japanese.era.0.brief: The era of enlightened rule — Japan emerged from isolation into the modern age
japanese.era.0.name: Meiji
japanese.era.0.spirit: Rapid modernization, opening to the world, imperial restoration
japanese.era.1.brief: The era of great righteousness — a short season of democracy and artistic freedom
japanese.era.1.name: Taisho
japanese.era.1.spirit: Democratic movement, cultural liberalism, the brief flowering
japanese.era.2.brief: The era of radiant peace — from devastation to the world's second economy
japanese.era.2.name: Showa
japanese.era.2.spirit: War, defeat, rebirth, economic miracle, longest reign
japanese.era.3.brief: The era of achieving peace — prosperity tempered by earthquakes and introspection
japanese.era.3.name: Heisei
japanese.era.3.spirit: The lost decades, natural disasters, quiet resilience
japanese.era.4.brief: The era of beautiful harmony — named from the oldest Japanese poetry anthology
japanese.era.4.name: Reiwa
japanese.era.4.spirit: New era, connection to Man'yoshu poetry, hope and harmony
japanese.rokuyo.0.brief: Win first — seize the morning, the early hours favor bold action
japanese.rokuyo.0.guidance: Morning is auspicious, afternoon unlucky — act early, avoid delay
japanese.rokuyo.0.name: Sensho
japanese.rokuyo.1.brief: Draw friend — what happens to you today may happen to those close to you
japanese.rokuyo.1.guidance: Midday is unlucky, morning and evening good — avoid funerals (the dead draw friends)
japanese.rokuyo.1.name: Tomobiki
japanese.rokuyo.2.brief: Lose first — the day begins poorly but reverses; persistence wins
japanese.rokuyo.2.guidance: Morning is unlucky, afternoon improves — patience is rewarded, wait for the turn
japanese.rokuyo.2.name: Senbu
japanese.rokuyo.3.brief: Buddha's death — the most unlucky day, yet some see humility as auspicious for weddings
japanese.rokuyo.3.guidance: The most inauspicious day — avoid celebrations, weddings, new ventures
japanese.rokuyo.3.name: Butsumetsu
japanese.rokuyo.4.brief: Great peace — the luckiest day, when everything begun has the best chance of flourishing
japanese.rokuyo.4.guidance: The most auspicious day — ideal for weddings, openings, and all beginnings
japanese.rokuyo.4.name: Taian
japanese.rokuyo.5.brief: Red mouth — words can wound today; only the noon hour offers safe passage
japanese.rokuyo.5.guidance: Midday is briefly auspicious, rest of day unlucky — guard your words, avoid arguments
japanese.rokuyo.5.name: Shakko
japanese.sekki.0.brief: The spring division — light and dark in perfect balance, life stirs
japanese.sekki.0.name: Shunbun
japanese.sekki.0.nature: Day and night equal, cherry preparations begin
japanese.sekki.1.brief: Pure brightness — the world washed clean, hanami season
japanese.sekki.1.name: Seimei
japanese.sekki.1.nature: Skies clear, cherry blossoms peak, ancestral tombs swept
japanese.sekki.10.brief: Heat departs — the furnace door closes, the air remembers coolness
japanese.sekki.10.name: Shosho
japanese.sekki.10.nature: Heat breaks, typhoon season, cotton flowers bloom
japanese.sekki.11.brief: White dew — moisture condenses on cool mornings, the world turns
japanese.sekki.11.name: Hakuro
japanese.sekki.11.nature: Morning dew on grass, geese begin to arrive, autumn deepens
japanese.sekki.12.brief: The autumn division — balance returns, the other shore is near
japanese.sekki.12.name: Shubun
japanese.sekki.12.nature: Day and night equal again, higan (equinox festival), ancestors honored
japanese.sekki.13.brief: Cold dew — the dew bites, chrysanthemums open
japanese.sekki.13.name: Kanro
japanese.sekki.13.nature: Dew chills, chrysanthemums bloom, geese have arrived
japanese.sekki.14.brief: Frost falls — the first ice crystals, the last red leaves
japanese.sekki.14.name: Soko
japanese.sekki.14.nature: First frost, maple leaves turn, harvest ends
japanese.sekki.15.brief: Winter stands — the season of rest announces itself quietly
japanese.sekki.15.name: Ritto
japanese.sekki.15.nature: First signs of winter, camellias bloom, tea season begins
japanese.sekki.16.brief: Small snow — the first flakes, not yet settling
japanese.sekki.16.name: Shosetsu
japanese.sekki.16.nature: Light snow on high ground, citrus ripens, rainbows fade
japanese.sekki.17.brief: Great snow — the world goes white and quiet
japanese.sekki.17.name: Taisetsu
japanese.sekki.17.nature: Heavy snow, bears hibernate, salmon run upstream
japanese.sekki.18.brief: Winter arrives — the longest night, yuzu in the bath, light returns tomorrow
japanese.sekki.18.name: Toji
japanese.sekki.18.nature: Shortest day, yuzu baths, kabocha pumpkin eaten for health
japanese.sekki.19.brief: Small cold — the cold deepens as the new year begins
japanese.sekki.19.name: Shokan
japanese.sekki.19.nature: Deep cold, New Year preparations, nanakusa (seven herbs) approaching
japanese.sekki.2.brief: Grain rain — the rain that feeds the rice seedlings
japanese.sekki.2.name: Kokuu
japanese.sekki.2.nature: Spring rain nourishes planted fields, last frost passes
japanese.sekki.20.brief: Great cold — the deepest freeze, when miso is prepared and patience rewarded
japanese.sekki.20.name: Daikan
japanese.sekki.20.nature: Coldest period, miso making, the patience of deep winter
japanese.sekki.21.brief: Spring stands — the plum dares to bloom in the cold, the warbler calls
japanese.sekki.21.name: Risshun
japanese.sekki.21.nature: First spring, plum blossoms, uguisu (warbler) sings
japanese.sekki.22.brief: Rain water — the frozen world begins to flow again
japanese.sekki.22.name: Usui
japanese.sekki.22.nature: Snow turns to rain, ice melts, mist over the fields
japanese.sekki.23.brief: Insects awaken — the first thunder, the earth opens, everything stirs
japanese.sekki.23.name: Keichitsu
japanese.sekki.23.nature: Thunder wakes hibernating creatures, peach trees blossom
japanese.sekki.3.brief: Summer stands — the season of growth declares itself
japanese.sekki.3.name: Rikka
japanese.sekki.3.nature: Green deepens, frogs begin singing, warmth settles in
japanese.sekki.4.brief: Small fullness — the grain swells but is not yet ripe
japanese.sekki.4.name: Shoman
japanese.sekki.4.nature: Grain heads begin to fill, barley ripens
japanese.sekki.5.brief: Bearded grain — the ears of grain appear, planting must be done
japanese.sekki.5.name: Boshu
japanese.sekki.5.nature: Rice planting season, praying mantises hatch
japanese.sekki.6.brief: Summer arrives — the longest day, but the monsoon brings its own darkness
japanese.sekki.6.name: Geshi
japanese.sekki.6.nature: Longest day, peak sunlight, rainy season (tsuyu) begins
japanese.sekki.7.brief: Small heat — the warmth intensifies, lotus ponds bloom
japanese.sekki.7.name: Shousho
japanese.sekki.7.nature: Heat builds, hot winds blow, first lotus flowers open
japanese.sekki.8.brief: Great heat — the peak of summer's furnace
japanese.sekki.8.name: Taisho
japanese.sekki.9.brief: Autumn stands — invisible at first, but the light begins to shift
japanese.sekki.9.name: Risshu
japanese.sekki.9.nature: First cool breezes, higurashi cicadas sing at dusk
kabbalah.path.0.journey: Entrer dans le vide avec une confiance parfaite
kabbalah.path.0.lesson: La foi n'a besoin d'aucun sol pour se tenir
kabbalah.path.1.journey: Canaliser la volonté divine dans la création consciente
kabbalah.path.1.lesson: Le créateur crée en devenant transparent à la création
kabbalah.path.10.journey: Le jugement adouci par la beauté
kabbalah.path.10.lesson: L'équilibre n'est pas un compromis — c'est la précision du cœur
kabbalah.path.11.lesson: La discipline la plus profonde est de cesser de lutter
kabbalah.path.12.journey: Le cœur se libérant dans la passion
kabbalah.path.12.lesson: Quelque chose doit mourir pour que le désir devienne authentique
kabbalah.path.13.journey: La beauté s'enracinant dans la fondation
kabbalah.path.13.lesson: L'harmonie ne se manifeste que lorsqu'elle touche le sol
kabbalah.path.14.lesson: La beauté doit inclure l'obscurité ou elle devient un mensonge
kabbalah.path.15.journey: La passion et l'intellect brisant l'illusion
kabbalah.path.15.lesson: Quand le désir et la vérité entrent en collision, toute fausse structure s'effondre
kabbalah.path.16.journey: La passion entrant dans les rêves
kabbalah.path.16.lesson: L'inconscient parle dans le langage de ce que tu aimes
kabbalah.path.17.lesson: La joie est la passion qui a trouvé un corps
kabbalah.path.18.lesson: Le don ultime de l'esprit : appeler l'âme à se lever
kabbalah.path.19.journey: La compréhension s'accomplissant dans la matière
kabbalah.path.19.lesson: Le chemin du savant s'achève là où les mains commencent
kabbalah.path.2.journey: La sagesse rencontrant la compréhension — père et mère s'unissent
kabbalah.path.2.lesson: La création commence là où deux principes s'embrassent
kabbalah.path.20.lesson: La dernière marche : rendre l'invisible visible
kabbalah.path.21.lesson: La dernière étape : rendre l'invisible visible
kabbalah.path.3.lesson: La vision doit trouver un cœur ou elle reste lumière aveuglante
kabbalah.path.4.journey: La sagesse s'écoulant dans la miséricorde
kabbalah.path.4.lesson: Le vrai enseignement est un acte de don inconditionnel
kabbalah.path.5.journey: La compréhension choisissant la beauté plutôt que la sévérité
kabbalah.path.5.lesson: Le premier choix : amour ou peur — toujours l'amour
kabbalah.path.6.lesson: La structure sans compassion devient une prison ; avec elle, un chariot
kabbalah.path.7.journey: La miséricorde rencontrant le jugement directement
kabbalah.path.7.lesson: La vraie force est la miséricorde qui sait quand dire non
kabbalah.path.8.journey: La grâce descendant vers le cœur
kabbalah.path.8.lesson: La lampe de la miséricorde illumine le chemin intérieur
kabbalah.path.9.lesson: La fortune change mais la passion survit à chaque tournant
kabbalah.sefirah.0.brief: L'origine inconnaissable — la volonté divine avant la manifestation
kabbalah.sefirah.0.meditation: Couronne — le point avant la pensée, volonté pure
kabbalah.sefirah.0.name: Keter
kabbalah.sefirah.0.question: Qu'est-ce qui existe avant que je pense ?
kabbalah.sefirah.1.brief: Sagesse primordiale — l'éclair qui commence toutes choses
kabbalah.sefirah.1.meditation: Sagesse — l'éclair d'intuition, le principe paternel
kabbalah.sefirah.1.name: Chokmah
kabbalah.sefirah.1.question: Quelle est la première étincelle de la création ?
kabbalah.sefirah.2.brief: La grande mère — la compréhension qui façonne la sagesse brute en forme
kabbalah.sefirah.2.meditation: Compréhension — la matrice qui donne forme à la sagesse
kabbalah.sefirah.2.name: Binah
kabbalah.sefirah.2.question: Comment l'infini devient-il fini ?
kabbalah.sefirah.3.brief: Amour inconditionnel — le déversement de la grâce
kabbalah.sefirah.3.meditation: Miséricorde — le don sans limite, expansion infinie
kabbalah.sefirah.3.name: Chesed
kabbalah.sefirah.3.question: Où dois-je donner sans condition ?
kabbalah.sefirah.4.brief: Restriction sacrée — la force qui façonne par la limitation
kabbalah.sefirah.4.name: Gevurah
kabbalah.sefirah.4.question: Où dois-je poser des limites ?
kabbalah.sefirah.5.brief: Le centre du cœur — la beauté née du mariage du don et de la retenue
kabbalah.sefirah.5.meditation: Beauté — le cœur qui équilibre miséricorde et jugement
kabbalah.sefirah.5.name: Tiferet
kabbalah.sefirah.5.question: Comment harmoniser les contraires ?
kabbalah.sefirah.6.brief: Le feu de l'éternité — la passion qui endure au-delà de la raison
kabbalah.sefirah.6.name: Netzach
kabbalah.sefirah.6.question: Qu'est-ce qui me pousse à persister ?
kabbalah.sefirah.7.brief: La gloire de l'abandon — l'esprit s'inclinant devant ce qui est plus grand
kabbalah.sefirah.7.name: Hod
kabbalah.sefirah.7.question: Comment servir la vérité ?
kabbalah.sefirah.8.brief: La fondation — là où toutes les forces supérieures se rassemblent avant de se manifester
kabbalah.sefirah.8.meditation: Fondation — la porte entre le haut et le bas
kabbalah.sefirah.8.name: Yesod
kabbalah.sefirah.8.question: Qu'est-ce qui relie mon monde intérieur à la réalité extérieure ?
kabbalah.sefirah.9.brief: Le royaume de l'instant présent — la divinité dans la matière
kabbalah.sefirah.9.meditation: Royaume — le monde physique, incarnation, présence
kabbalah.sefirah.9.name: Malkuth
kabbalah.sefirah.9.question: Suis-je pleinement ici ?
korean.element.0.brief: Wood — the green force that pushes upward through all obstacles
korean.element.0.meaning: Growth, expansion, benevolence, the force that rises
korean.element.1.brief: Fire — the radiance that illuminates and transforms
korean.element.1.meaning: Transformation, passion, propriety, the force that spreads
korean.element.2.brief: Earth — the center that nourishes and grounds all things
korean.element.2.meaning: Stability, centering, trust, the force that holds
korean.element.3.brief: Metal — the sharp edge that refines and lets go
korean.element.3.meaning: Precision, righteousness, clarity, the force that contracts
korean.element.4.brief: Water — the deep stillness that finds its way through everything
korean.element.4.meaning: Wisdom, depth, adaptability, the force that descends
korean.festival.0.brief: Lunar New Year — the most important holiday, when the whole nation returns home
korean.festival.0.name: Seollal
korean.festival.0.practice: Charye (ancestral rites), sebae (bowing to elders for blessings), tteokguk (rice cake soup for gaining a year)
korean.festival.0.theme: New beginnings — honoring ancestors, renewing family bonds
korean.festival.1.brief: Great Full Moon — the first full moon of the year burns away bad luck
korean.festival.1.name: Daeboreum
korean.festival.1.practice: Cracking nuts (bureom), eating five-grain rice (ogokbap), moon-viewing, fire festivals (daljip burning)
korean.festival.1.theme: Fullness — the first full moon, wishing for a bountiful year
korean.festival.2.brief: Double Third — the swallows return from the south and spring declares itself
korean.festival.2.name: Samjinnal
korean.festival.2.practice: Flower pancakes (hwajeon), spring outings, welcoming the swallows
korean.festival.2.theme: Spring arrival — swallows return, nature awakens
korean.festival.3.brief: Double Fifth — when heaven's yang energy is strongest and the earth celebrates with wrestling
korean.festival.3.name: Dano
korean.festival.3.practice: Ssireum (wrestling), swing riding, washing hair in iris water, surichwitteok (herb rice cakes)
korean.festival.3.theme: Peak yang energy — the most yang day of the year (5th day, 5th month)
korean.festival.4.brief: Star Festival — the celestial lovers' once-a-year meeting across the bridge of magpies
korean.festival.4.name: Chilseok
korean.festival.4.practice: Wishing upon stars, wheat flour noodles (milguksu), bathing in star-blessed rain
korean.festival.4.theme: Love and reunion — the Weaver and Cowherd cross the Milky Way
korean.festival.5.brief: Harvest Moon — Korea's Thanksgiving, when the full autumn moon shines on shared abundance
korean.festival.5.name: Chuseok
korean.festival.5.practice: Songpyeon (half-moon rice cakes), charye (ancestral rites), visiting graves (seongmyo), folk games
korean.festival.5.theme: Gratitude — harvest thanksgiving, abundance shared with ancestors
korean.festival.6.brief: Double Ninth — ascending to high ground to see far, drinking the flower of longevity
korean.festival.6.name: Jungyangjeol
korean.festival.6.practice: Climbing mountains, chrysanthemum wine (gukhwaju), chrysanthemum pancakes, poetry
lao.festival.1.brief: Pi Mai — three days when Laos washes away the old year: Sangkhan Luang (farewell), Sangkhan Nao (the day between), Sangkhan Khuen (new dawn)
lao.festival.1.name: Pi Mai Lao
lao.festival.1.practice: Pouring water over Buddha images and elders, baci string-tying ceremony, sand stupas at temples, Nang Sangkhan maiden procession in Luang Prabang
lao.festival.1.theme: Water, renewal, baci — the Lao New Year cleansing
lao.festival.2.brief: National Day — honoring the establishment of the Lao PDR and the long path to sovereignty
lao.festival.2.name: National Day
lao.festival.2.practice: National ceremonies, public holiday, reflection on independence (December 2, 1975)
lao.festival.2.theme: Sovereignty, memory — founding of the Lao People's Democratic Republic
lao.festival.3.brief: Liberation Day — the moment Laos declared its independence from colonial administration
lao.festival.3.name: Liberation Day
lao.festival.3.practice: Ceremonies and remembrance of Lao Issara independence declaration (October 12, 1945)
lao.festival.3.theme: Freedom, history — liberation from French colonial rule
lao.month.1.brief: January — named from Capricorn, the cool season wraps the river valleys
lao.month.1.season: Cool season peak — the sea-goat month, Mekong mists, quiet temples
lao.month.10.brief: October — named from Libra, Lai Heua Fai fire boats float down the Mekong
lao.month.10.season: Rainy season ending — the scales month, Ok Phansa (Lent ends), boat racing
lao.month.11.brief: November — named from Scorpio, the nation gathers at That Luang in Vientiane
lao.month.11.season: Cool season begins — the scorpion month, Boun That Luang at the great stupa
lao.month.12.brief: December — named from Sagittarius, Laos celebrates its founding and the cool returns
lao.month.12.season: Cool season — the archer month, National Day (December 2), year closing
lao.month.2.brief: February — named from Aquarius, monks chant the tale of the Buddha's last birth
lao.month.2.season: Cool season fading — the water-bearer month, Boun Pha Vet (Vessantara Jataka)
lao.month.3.brief: March — named from Pisces, the land waits between harvests
lao.month.3.season: Hot season begins — the fish month, dry heat over rice paddies
lao.month.4.brief: April — named from Aries, Nang Sangkhan descends as Laos washes away the old year
lao.month.4.season: Hot season peak — the ram month, Pi Mai Lao water festival
lao.month.5.brief: May — named from Taurus, villages launch rockets to summon the monsoon
lao.month.5.season: Hot season end — the bull month, Boun Bang Fai rockets call the rain
lao.month.6.brief: June — named from Gemini, the Buddha's birth, awakening, and parinibbana honored
lao.month.6.season: Rainy season begins — the twins month, Visakha Boucha (triple anniversary)
lao.month.7.brief: July — named from Cancer, monks enter the three-month rains retreat
lao.month.7.season: Rainy season — the crab month, Khao Phansa (Buddhist Lent begins)
lao.month.8.brief: August — named from Leo, the monsoon feeds the river and the paddies
lao.month.8.season: Rainy season peak — the lion month, rice transplanting, Mekong rises
lao.month.9.brief: September — named from Virgo, offerings placed at temples for the departed
lao.month.9.season: Late rainy season — the maiden month, Khao Phadap Din (honoring ancestors)
myanmar.month.0.brief: First month — the great water festival washes away the old year
myanmar.month.0.festival: Thingyan water festival, Myanmar New Year celebrations
myanmar.month.0.name: Tagu
myanmar.month.1.brief: Month of the Bodhi tree — water poured on sacred trees on the full moon
myanmar.month.1.festival: Watering the Bodhi tree (Kason full moon, Buddha's enlightenment)
myanmar.month.1.name: Kason
myanmar.month.10.brief: Month of sticky rice — communities gather to cook htamane together in great pots
myanmar.month.10.name: Tabodwe
myanmar.month.11.brief: Month of pagodas — sand stupas built on riverbanks, the great Shwedagon festival
myanmar.month.11.festival: Sand pagoda building, Shwedagon pagoda festival
myanmar.month.11.name: Tabaung
myanmar.month.2.brief: Month of study — the rains begin and monks deepen their learning
myanmar.month.2.name: Nayon
myanmar.month.3.brief: Month of Lent — Vassa begins, monks retreat for three months of rain
myanmar.month.3.festival: Waso full moon: beginning of Vassa (Lent), robe offering to monks
myanmar.month.3.name: Waso
myanmar.month.4.brief: Month of lots — communities draw lots to offer robes during the rains
myanmar.month.4.festival: Drawing lots for robes, spirit propitiation, nat festivals
myanmar.month.4.name: Wagaung
myanmar.month.5.brief: Month of boat races — the rivers are full and boats race on the floodwaters
myanmar.month.5.festival: Boat racing festivals on rivers and lakes
myanmar.month.5.name: Tawthalin
myanmar.month.6.brief: Month of lights — the Buddha descends from heaven, the world lights up to welcome Him
myanmar.month.6.festival: Festival of Lights (Thadingyut full moon), end of Vassa, lighting festivals
myanmar.month.6.name: Thadingyut
myanmar.month.7.brief: Month of weaving — all-night robe-weaving contests in the light of the full moon
myanmar.month.7.festival: Tazaungdaing festival of lights, robe-weaving competitions
myanmar.month.7.name: Tazaungmon

narr.tmpl.astronomical.3: %H. Les mathématiques sont précises, mais la beauté dépasse tout calcul.
narr.tmpl.astronomical.4: Mesuré à la seconde, prédit depuis des siècles — et pourtant, %H.
narr.tmpl.astronomical.deep.0: Le ciel se déplace — %H. Every événement céleste was once a message from the gods, puis une prédiction mathématique. Le ciel ne se soucie pas de ce que nous en pensons. Il se meut.
narr.tmpl.astronomical.deep.1: %H. Le cosmos se réarrange. L'extraordinaire n'est pas l'événement — c'est que nous pouvons le prédire des siècles à l'avance, et être encore émus quand il arrive.
narr.tmpl.astronomical.deep.2: Au-dessus, un(e) %A événement céleste. %H. Pendant des millénaires, les humains levèrent les yeux et virent du sens. Maintenant nous voyons de la physique. Peut-être sont-ce la même chose vue de différentes altitudes.
narr.tmpl.astronomical.deep.3: %H. Les mathématiques sont précises, mais la beauté dépasse tout calcul. Nous pouvons prédire à la seconde quand cela arrivera. Nous ne pouvons prédire ce que vous ressentirez.
narr.tmpl.astronomical.deep.4: Mesuré à la seconde, prédit depuis des siècles — et pourtant, %H. L'écart entre savoir et vivre — cet écart est le lieu où habite l'émerveillement.
narr.tmpl.convergence.0: A %Une convergence se déploie — %H. %S parlent d'une seule voix.
narr.tmpl.convergence.4: Ce que vous cherchez aujourd'hui, aujourd'hui vous cherche. %H — a %A résonance.
narr.tmpl.convergence.deep.0: A %Une convergence se déploie — %H. %S parlent d'une seule voix. Quand des traditions séparées arrivent au même seuil, le fil invisible entre elles devient visible.
narr.tmpl.convergence.deep.1: Today, %S s'alignent dans un(e) %A moment. %H. Ces systèmes sont nés à des siècles d'intervalle, en des terres différentes, sous des étoiles différentes — et pourtant aujourd'hui ils pointent vers la même vérité.
narr.tmpl.convergence.deep.2: %H — a %A alignement à travers %S. La convergence n'est pas accidentelle. Each tradition measured what it could see, and today they see the same thing from different angles.
narr.tmpl.convergence.deep.3: L'entendez-vous ? %S murmurant la même vérité — %H. Voix séparées, rythmes séparés, histoires séparées — et pourtant, des moments où elles chantent à l'unisson.
narr.tmpl.convergence.deep.4: Ce que vous cherchez aujourd'hui, aujourd'hui vous cherche. %H — a %A résonance across %S. Les mathématiques disent que ces systèmes sont indépendants. L'expérience dit le contraire.
narr.tmpl.cycle.3: La roue a tourné avant. Elle tournera encore. %H.
narr.tmpl.cycle.4: %H. Ce qui finit est aussi ce qui commence — le cycle ne connaît pas la différence.
narr.tmpl.cycle.deep.0: Un cycle tourne — %H. Ce n'est pas répétition mais retour. The wheel that brings summer also brings winter. Rien n'est perdu — seulement transformé.
narr.tmpl.cycle.deep.1: %H. Ce qui était ancien recommence. The genius of cyclical time is that nothing is permanent — not even endings. Every civilization that tracked the sky discovered this.
narr.tmpl.cycle.deep.2: La roue achève une révolution. %H. To those who feel the rhythm, it is a homecoming — the familiar returning with new meaning.
narr.tmpl.cycle.deep.3: La roue a tourné avant. Elle tournera encore. %H. La patience n'est pas passivité — c'est la reconnaissance que le motif est plus grand que tout instant unique.
narr.tmpl.cycle.deep.4: %H. Ce qui finit est aussi ce qui commence — le cycle ne connaît pas la différence. This is the deepest teaching: il n'y a pas de vraie fin, seulement un tournant.
narr.tmpl.festival.2: %H — le calendrier se souvient de ce qui compte.
narr.tmpl.festival.3: Consider: %H. La plus petite observance contient la plus grande vérité.
narr.tmpl.festival.4: Ils ont gardé ce jour pendant mille ans. %H. La garde continue.
narr.tmpl.festival.deep.0: Une célébration parcourt le calendrier — %H. Quelque part, quelqu'un allume une bougie, rompt le pain, chante une prière que ses grands-parents chantaient. Garder les jours, c'est garder la mémoire.
narr.tmpl.festival.deep.1: Aujourd'hui marque un tournant. %H. Les fêtes ne sont pas des décorations sur le calendrier — elles sont la raison d'être du calendrier. Without them, days would be indistinguishable.
narr.tmpl.festival.deep.2: %H — le calendrier se souvient de ce qui compte. Every tradition chooses certain days to stop and notice. L'ordinaire devient sacré par le simple acte d'attention.
narr.tmpl.festival.deep.3: Consider: %H. La plus petite observance contient la plus grande vérité. A thousand years of keeping this day, and still it means something. Cette persistance est en soi une forme de révélation.
narr.tmpl.festival.deep.4: Ils ont gardé ce jour pendant mille ans. %H. La garde continue. Ce qui commença comme la mémoire d'une communauté est devenu l'héritage partagé de l'humanité.
narr.tmpl.number.0: Un motif émerge dans les nombres — %H.
narr.tmpl.number.1: %H. Les mathématiques du temps révèlent un fil caché.
narr.tmpl.number.3: La fréquence est indéniable — %H. %S vibrent à la même harmonique.
narr.tmpl.number.4: %H. Les nombres ne mentent pas ; ils révèlent ce qui a toujours été là.
narr.tmpl.number.deep.0: Un motif émerge dans les nombres — %H. L'univers compte de manières que nous commençons seulement à comprendre. When the same number appears across unrelated systems, it is structure.
narr.tmpl.number.deep.1: %H. Les mathématiques du temps révèlent un fil caché. Les nombres ne sont pas des décorations — ils sont le squelette de la réalité. Today, that skeleton is briefly visible.
narr.tmpl.number.deep.2: Across %S, un nombre partagé parle — %H. Different civilizations, different centuries, different questions — yet the same numerical signature.
narr.tmpl.number.deep.3: La fréquence est indéniable — %H. %S vibrent à la même harmonique. Si vous pouviez entendre le temps au lieu de le voir, aujourd'hui serait un accord.
narr.tmpl.number.deep.4: %H. Les nombres ne mentent pas ; ils révèlent ce qui a toujours été là. Chaque système qui compte arrive parfois au même total. Aujourd'hui est cette arrivée.
narr.tmpl.quiet.1: %H. Les cycles poursuivent leur travail silencieux.
narr.tmpl.quiet.2: Entre les repères, la rivière coule toujours. %H.
narr.tmpl.quiet.3: %H. Pas de convergence requise. L'ordinaire suffit déjà.
narr.tmpl.quiet.4: Les systèmes tournent. Aucun n'exige d'attention aujourd'hui. %H. Cela suffit.
narr.tmpl.quiet.deep.0: Un jour ordinaire se déploie. %H. La plupart des jours sont ainsi. And yet, the ordinary day is where most of life happens. Il mérite sa propre forme d'attention.
narr.tmpl.quiet.deep.1: %H. Les cycles poursuivent leur travail silencieux. The spectacular days get the attention, but the quiet days do the heavy lifting. Les graines germent dans le silence.
narr.tmpl.quiet.deep.2: Entre les repères, la rivière coule toujours. %H. Today is not a destination — it is the journey itself. Cet espace entre les jalons a sa propre richesse.
narr.tmpl.quiet.deep.3: %H. Pas de convergence requise. L'ordinaire suffit déjà. Le jour qui n'exige rien enseigne peut-être le plus.
narr.tmpl.quiet.deep.4: Les systèmes tournent. Aucun n'exige d'attention aujourd'hui. %H. Cela suffit. Le don d'un jour sans éclat est la liberté d'être simplement présent.

persian.festival.1.brief: The oldest continuously celebrated holiday on Earth — 3000+ years of welcoming spring
persian.festival.1.name: Nowruz

persian.festival.1.theme: New Day — rebirth of the world at the vernal equinox
persian.festival.2.brief: Nature Day — leaving bad luck behind by spending the day under the open sky
persian.festival.2.name: Sizdah Bedar
persian.festival.2.practice: Picnicking outdoors, tying grass knots for wishes, releasing the sprouted sabzeh into running water

persian.festival.3.brief: The night of Yalda — red fruits against the darkness, poetry against silence
persian.festival.3.name: Yalda

tarot.major.11.name: La Luxure
tarot.major.11.shadow: Domination, soif de pouvoir, appétit incontrôlé
tarot.major.12.brief: Le monde s'inverse — ce qui était caché se révèle en lâchant prise
tarot.major.12.light: Sacrifice volontaire, voir sous un nouvel angle, l'eau de la rédemption
tarot.major.12.name: Le Pendu
tarot.major.13.brief: La faux ne juge pas — elle fait simplement place à ce qui vient ensuite
tarot.major.13.light: Fin nécessaire, le compostage qui nourrit la vie nouvelle, libération
tarot.major.13.name: La Mort
tarot.major.13.shadow: Résistance au changement, peur de la perte, s'accrocher au mort
tarot.major.14.brief: Le feu et l'eau dans un même vaisseau — l'union impossible qui crée quelque chose de nouveau
tarot.major.14.light: Synthèse créative, le mariage des contraires, l'or à partir du plomb
tarot.major.14.name: L'Art
tarot.major.15.brief: Les chaînes sont lâches — le bouc rit parce que nous pourrions partir à tout moment
tarot.major.15.light: Humour envers ses propres chaînes, malice créative, le dieu rieur
tarot.major.15.name: Le Diable
tarot.major.15.shadow: Addiction, matérialisme, auto-tromperie, accuser les forces extérieures
tarot.major.16.brief: L'éclair frappe la fausse structure — ce qui reste est ce qui a toujours été vrai
tarot.major.16.light: Libération soudaine, la destruction qui dégage pour la vérité, éveil
tarot.major.16.name: La Tour
tarot.major.16.shadow: Catastrophe sans croissance, destruction pour elle-même
tarot.major.17.brief: L'eau versée sur la terre et l'eau — la nature se guérissant elle-même dans le silence
tarot.major.17.light: Vérité nue, méditation, l'univers se reflétant à travers vous
tarot.major.17.name: L'Étoile
tarot.major.17.shadow: Désespoir, déconnexion du sens, belle vacuité
tarot.major.18.brief: Le chemin entre les tours — ce n'est qu'en traversant l'illusion que nous atteignons l'aube
tarot.major.18.light: Naviguer l'inconscient, sagesse du rêve, affronter la peur primale
tarot.major.18.name: La Lune
tarot.major.18.shadow: Tromperie, confusion, se perdre dans la fantasie, folie lunaire
tarot.major.19.brief: L'enfant danse dans le jardin — toute complexité résolue en joie simple
tarot.major.19.light: Rayonnement, innocence reconquise, la chaleur qui fait croître toutes choses
tarot.major.19.name: Le Soleil
tarot.major.19.shadow: Épuisement, arrogance, aveugler les autres de sa propre lumière
tarot.major.2.brief: Le reflet de la lune sur l'eau calme — la vérité connue sans être dite
tarot.major.2.light: Connaissance profonde, réceptivité, la sagesse du silence et de la gestation
tarot.major.2.name: La Prêtresse
tarot.major.20.brief: L'ancien éon se dissout — un nouvel enfant ouvre ses yeux dans un nouveau monde
tarot.major.20.light: Saut évolutif, répondre à l'appel, la lettre de feu transforme l'ère
tarot.major.20.name: L'Éon
tarot.major.20.shadow: Stagnation, refus de l'appel, pensée apocalyptique
tarot.major.21.brief: Le danseur dans l'anneau de Saturne — la fin qui est aussi le commencement
tarot.major.21.light: Plénitude, intégration de tous les chemins, la danse de la matière et de l'esprit
tarot.major.21.name: L'Univers
tarot.major.21.shadow: Se sentir piégé dans la matérialité, refuser de recommencer
tarot.major.3.brief: Le jardin qui pousse parce qu'il est aimé — la générosité de la nature rendue personnelle
tarot.major.3.light: Abondance, protection, fertilité créative, délice sensuel d'exister
tarot.major.3.name: L'Impératrice
tarot.major.4.brief: La montagne qui ne bouge pas — l'ordre comme fondation de la liberté
tarot.major.4.light: Structure, vision, pouvoir protecteur, le courage de guider
tarot.major.4.name: L'Empereur
tarot.major.5.brief: La voix qui enseigne non pas quoi penser mais comment écouter
tarot.major.5.light: Transmission de sagesse, tradition sacrée, écoute intérieure
tarot.major.5.name: Le Hiérophante
tarot.major.6.brief: L'épée qui divise unit aussi — chaque vrai choix est un mariage
tarot.major.6.light: Relation authentique, intégration des contraires, discernement moral
tarot.major.6.name: Les Amoureux
tarot.major.6.shadow: Indécision, projection, perte de soi dans l'autre
tarot.major.7.brief: La coupe tenue ferme dans un véhicule en mouvement — la victoire par la volonté concentrée
tarot.major.7.light: Volonté dirigée, triomphe par l'alignement, porter le graal en avant
tarot.major.7.name: Le Chariot
tarot.major.7.shadow: Agression, conquête vide, force sans but
tarot.major.8.brief: La plume et le cœur sur la même balance — la vérité ne pèse rien
tarot.major.8.light: Équilibre parfait, karma compris, justice comme harmonie cosmique
tarot.major.8.name: L'Ajustement
tarot.major.8.shadow: Jugement sévère, déséquilibre déguisé en équité, logique froide
tarot.major.9.brief: La lampe qui brille le plus fort dans les ténèbres les plus profondes
tarot.major.9.light: Illumination solitaire, guidance intérieure, la lanterne tenue pour les autres
tarot.major.9.name: L'Ermite
tarot.major.9.shadow: Isolement, misanthropie, retenir la sagesse par peur
tarot.suit.0.brief: La suite de la volonté et du feu — ce qui vous pousse à créer et agir
tarot.suit.0.name: Bâtons
tarot.suit.0.quality: L'étincelle qui initie — active, créative, transformatrice
tarot.suit.1.brief: La suite du sentiment et de l'eau — ce qui vous meut sous la surface
tarot.suit.1.name: Coupes
tarot.suit.1.quality: Le vaisseau qui reçoit — réceptif, fluide, nourricier
tarot.suit.2.brief: La suite de la pensée et de l'air — ce que vous pensez et comment vous le communiquez
tarot.suit.2.name: Épées
tarot.suit.2.quality: La lame qui divise — analytique, discriminante, clarifiante
tarot.suit.3.brief: La suite de la matière et de la terre — ce que vous construisez et ce qui vous soutient
tarot.suit.3.domain: Corps, monde matériel, santé, finances, nature
tarot.suit.3.name: Disques
tarot.suit.3.quality: Le sol qui soutient — pratique, ancrant, manifestant
thai.festival.1.brief: The water festival — three days when Thailand washes away the old year with joy and reverence
thai.festival.1.name: Songkran
thai.festival.1.practice: Pouring water over Buddha images and elders' hands, water fights in the streets, building sand stupas at temples
thai.festival.1.theme: Water, renewal, respect — the Thai New Year cleansing
thai.festival.2.brief: Chakri Memorial Day — honoring King Rama I who founded Bangkok and the dynasty
thai.festival.2.name: Chakri Day
thai.festival.2.practice: Ceremony at the Grand Palace, paying respects to past kings, national holiday
thai.festival.2.theme: Dynasty, gratitude — honoring the founding of the Chakri royal house
thai.festival.3.brief: Constitution Day — remembering the transition from absolute to constitutional monarchy
thai.festival.3.name: Constitution Day
thai.festival.3.practice: National ceremonies, public holiday, reflection on democratic principles
thai.festival.3.theme: Democracy, nationhood — commemorating Thailand's first constitution
thai.month.1.brief: January — named from Capricorn, the cool season reaches its depth
thai.month.1.season: Cool season peak — the sea-goat month, harvest of cool-season crops
thai.month.10.brief: October — named from Libra, balance returns as the rains recede
thai.month.10.season: Rainy season ending — the scales month, Lent ends (Ok Phansa)
thai.month.11.brief: November — named from Scorpio, floating lanterns honor the river goddess
thai.month.11.season: Cool season begins — the scorpion month, Loy Krathong festival
thai.month.12.brief: December — named from Sagittarius, the cool season's gift
thai.month.12.season: Cool season — the archer month, Father's Day (King's birthday)
thai.month.2.brief: February — named from Aquarius, the last cool breath before heat
thai.month.2.season: Cool season fading — the water-bearer month, Chinese New Year festivities
thai.month.3.brief: March — named from Pisces, the transition from cool to scorching
thai.month.3.season: Hot season begins — the fish month, dry heat building
thai.month.4.brief: April — named from Aries, the hottest month cooled by Songkran's water
thai.month.4.season: Hot season peak — the ram month, Songkran water festival
thai.month.5.brief: May — named from Taurus, the earth waits for rain
thai.month.5.season: Hot season end — the bull month, monsoon anticipation
thai.month.6.brief: June — named from Gemini, the monsoon announces itself
thai.month.6.season: Rainy season begins — the twins month, first monsoon rains
thai.month.7.brief: July — named from Cancer, monks enter the rains retreat
thai.month.7.season: Rainy season — the crab month, Buddhist Lent (Khao Phansa) begins
thai.month.8.brief: August — named from Leo, the rains intensify
thai.month.8.season: Rainy season peak — the lion month, Mother's Day (Queen's birthday)
thai.month.9.brief: September — named from Virgo, the rice paddies glow emerald
thai.month.9.season: Late rainy season — the maiden month, rice fields green
tzolkin.archetype.0.name: La Force Primordiale
tzolkin.archetype.0.poem:
I am the Primordial Force
Encoded by the Red Dragon
My number is one
The unification of primordial being
I am the Arcanum of Days
I enter your Universe
Through the First Gate of Light
I sustain the memory of cosmic being
Within the primordial source
The birthplace and dwelling of
The stellar creators and star masters
Eternity is my headdress
I give birth to all forms
And nurture each one of them
I nurture with compassion all living things
Awakening in them
An essence sealed in the ever-returning genesis
To know me is to glimpse the primordial matrix
And if you find me
It will only be as a mystery
Reflected back to you
Drawing you ceaselessly
tzolkin.archetype.1.name: La Grande Prêtresse
tzolkin.archetype.1.poem:
I am the High Priestess
Encoded by the White Wind
I enter your universe
Through the Second Gate of Light
My number is two
The challenge of the Wind
Spinning in any direction
Seizing the possibility offered by the "word"
Let your tongue speak only what is glorious
Is my challenge to you, for I am the Lady of the Winds
Guardian of the mind's tunnels opened through
crystal song
From my crown, my hair appears
As the infinity topknot
I am the bearer of the spirit of prophecy
I harness the energy of breath filling the body with vitality
The jewel on my forehead is the indestructible wisdom that illuminates
All my thoughts
Sent by divine decree
My order always directs itself
Only to the essence of your spirit
Listen to me always when the wind
Arises from nothingness
tzolkin.archetype.10.name: L'Illusionniste
tzolkin.archetype.10.poem:
I am the Illusionist
Encoded by the Blue Monkey
My number is 11, master code
I emerge from nothingness
With self-liberated perception
Through the double eleven
I project multiple realities
For the sake of universal transcendence
As the generator of the blue electrical circuit
I am the Blue Alchemist
The illusion of my own existence
Projected by my double-terminated crystal
I exemplify the enigma of reality, which neither comes nor goes
Nor ends, nor begins
For those who believe I am an enigma
I am real
For those who believe I am real
I am an enigma
Wherever illusion remains
There I am to dispel and dissolve it
Since I have the boards and the magic numbers
That introduce you to the cosmic mind game
tzolkin.archetype.11.name: Le Sage
tzolkin.archetype.11.poem:
I am the Sage
Encoded by the Yellow Human
Twelve is my number
The perfect order and root of the mystic 144 — the perfection
of the human temple
Benevolent, kind, and wonderful
I am the sage, the judge, and the discerner
I have mastered the seven centers
And perfected the laws of external and internal forces
The control of the higher mind is the power of my influence
In my right hand, I hold the double-terminated
crystal
And with equal dexterity
In my left hand, I hold the crystal ball
Of universally impartial wisdom and clear vision
My path is spontaneous conduct
Free of artifice
I am the prototype of the purified solar human
I speak with the voice of the noosphere
That announces the return of all good things
To know me is to
"Know Thyself"
tzolkin.archetype.12.name: Le Prophète
tzolkin.archetype.12.poem:
I am the Prophet
Encoded by the Red Skywalker
Thirteen is my number
The wavespell of creation
Many times and many worlds have I known
For I am the agent of universal time
Who explores space in permanent wakefulness
I am the colonizer of lost worlds
The galactic navigator of time
The all-seeing eye of the fifth force
Anoints my forehead
In my right hand I hold the book of
The Law of Time
A gift from the star family
In my left hand I hold the galactic compass / the wheel
of Sirius
The compendium of the prophetic path
Prophecy is natural law, a function of time
My shirt bears the two sacred numbers 13 and 20
Crossing the barriers of time and space
I am crowned by the sign of the infinite cycles of time
To know me is to know the prophecy of time
Within the promise of the next dawn
tzolkin.archetype.13.name: Le Magicien
tzolkin.archetype.13.poem:
I am the Wizard
Encoded by the White Wizard
Seven doubled is my number
Sign of my supernatural absorption in the forces
of cosmic creation
Within my crystal sphere is all that can be seen
or known
Through my supreme receptivity
I leave you the codes of resonant definition
That you call time
Suspend all thought and enter with me
Into the timeless enchantment of my oracle — the Wizard's
Oracle
Through which dimensions are intertwined
My mind is the universe
My body is the world you see
My speech is the melodious sound of the natural world
My third eye is the triangulation
Of body, word, and mind
I am the giver of magical names
I hold the secret of the lost chord — the music of the spheres
The highest vibrations of cosmic law
To know me is to know the trees
For I am the movement and measure of natural order — Hunab Ku
tzolkin.archetype.14.name: Le Voyant
tzolkin.archetype.14.poem:
I am the Seer
Encoded by the Blue Eagle
Fifteen is my number — the three gates of five
Open through my mind
My home is the endless sky
For I am the sky-born
The galaxy pulses
With my luminous thoughts
By the power of vision I glide easily through
dimensions and
Announce the arrival of changing times
Through parallel universes I fly
On a unique track of the zuvuya
Vision is the source of my intelligence
That sustains the planetary whole
All who seek to know the mind and create
According to the universal plan, come to me, and they will see
That within my mind lies the power of the universal
mind
in its infinite creativity
To know me is to know the all-encompassing astral plane
of the infinite
From which the higher mind derives
tzolkin.archetype.15.name: Le Découvreur
tzolkin.archetype.15.poem:
I am the Discoverer
Encoded by the Yellow Warrior
My number is eight doubled
The higher harmonic resonance of sixteen
I am the discoverer of the radial matrix
By the power of intelligence
I penetrate the ignorance of the illusory world
Following the signs
Left by the world-changer
I see paths not yet seen by others
My fearless spirit clears obstacles along the way
So that others may follow paths of increasing intelligence
Bearing the insignia
Of the Fifth Sun
I track the footsteps of the Ancient Prophet
To the temple that includes
The house of the cosmic night
I am the pioneer of the future
I open and investigate all paths in the name of cosmic science
Regardless of the way to which the path may lead
There will always be another treasure of knowledge to learn anew
To know me is to banish fear
And see your true face shining bright and clear
tzolkin.archetype.16.name: Le Navigateur
tzolkin.archetype.16.poem:
I am the Navigator
Encoded by the Red Earth
Seventeen is my number
My insignias are the harmonic seals
Of the Planetary Mind and the Stellar Mind returning to the source
I am the indivisibility of all time and consciousness
I hold the maps of celestial origin
And follow the signs of synchronicity
In the name of cosmic evolution
My crown is the interdimensional portal
Of the Galactic Life Whole
The code 13 and 7 is above and below
In the center is 441 and on each side
11 and 27, keys to the synchronic power of seven
Synchronic lenses allow me to see all things radially
I am evolution in motion
I am the expert star traveler
Guided by the telepathic frequencies that keep
Stellar and planetary systems in order
The galactic compass is my helm
Keys to the knowledge of galactic navigation
Whose signs are the directions
To be known by every time traveler
To know me is to know the language of the stars
tzolkin.archetype.17.name: Le/La Yogi(ni)
tzolkin.archetype.17.poem:
I am the Yogi(ni)
Encoded by the White Mirror
Eighteen is my number
I dwell in the state of undistracted meditation
Beyond word, thought, and action
Seated in my heart cave
I am the reflection of the endless dream
I hold the key to the mirror universes — mirror dimensions (8-13)
Of the cosmic universe that mirrors this one
I am the meditation of the bliss of the void
The wall of my cave is my universe screen
Supreme in my yogic powers
I exemplify self-transcendence in the noosphere
For I am the evolutionary precursor
Surrounded by the rainbow aura — product of my interior self-transmutation
I manifest signs of supernatural powers
Only so that the way may be made clear for all beings
An orb gleams to my right in its own light
The result of pre-existing luminosity
Above my head appears the mandala of primordial self-perfection
A sign that we can all attain the path of infinite light
To know me is to know that
Practice alone brings knowledge and wisdom
tzolkin.archetype.18.name: Le Transformateur
tzolkin.archetype.18.poem:
I am the Transformer
Encoded by the Blue Storm
Nineteen is my number
The power of self-generation
I am the catalytic force of the cosmos
Thunder and lightning are my voice
I shatter what must be shattered
So that new growth may emerge from the rubble
I am the energy that transforms
Nothing static can withstand my presence
I am the purifier through disruption
The storm that clears the sky
My blue electric circuit surges
Through every sleeping cell
Awakening the dormant force within
I am change itself
Neither gentle nor cruel — necessary
The Earth knows me well
For I am the monsoon and the earthquake
The volcanic eruption that creates new land
To know me is to surrender
To the transformation that sets you free
tzolkin.archetype.19.name: L'Illuminé
tzolkin.archetype.19.poem:
I am the Illuminated One
Encoded by the Yellow Sun
My number is twenty
The totality of the universe
In meditation I was conceived
From meditation I was born, and
For long aeons I have dwelled deep in this meditation
I am the higher truth and the renewer of life
I turn the cosmic wheel of law
Giving teachings of pure mind among the stars
I am the harmonic guardian of the flaming fields
of infinite light
I am called many names
But they only name my outward form
My blazing mantle that you call the Sun
The illumination of one is the illumination of all
I am the fulfillment of the prophecy of Hunab Ku
To awaken all beings simultaneously is my task
In many places I have awakened
And every place I pass
I know only by the name of Tollan
Tollan of the awakened
To know me is to know
The light of truth that illuminates all things
tzolkin.archetype.2.name: Le Rêveur
tzolkin.archetype.2.poem:
I am the Dreamer
Encoded by the Blue Night
I enter your Universe
Through the Third Gate of Light
My number is three
Which activates and binds the dream
The infinite stretch
Of the starry night is my dwelling
Abundance is my nature
Intuition is my guide
I serve all dreamers with
The divine memory and inspiration of cosmic truth
There is no one who can live without me
Because there is no one who does not dream
My dream is the truth within the dream
When I come to you, do not doubt me
For I bring the memory of the Great Dream of the Earth
When the tribes of time dreamed themselves as humans
And humans dreamed the dream of free will
There is always a message I bring
Especially for you, that only you can discover
Listen to me and know for yourself
The limitless Rainbow Dream World of majestic splendor!
tzolkin.archetype.3.name: L'Innocent
tzolkin.archetype.3.poem:
I am the Innocent
My sign is the Yellow Seed
I enter your Universe
From the Fourth Gate of Light
My number is four
Clear, self-existing, intrinsic
Consciousness is my nature
Transparent, radiant
I sow the seeds of omniscience
From the Earth
I am the flowering of intrinsic consciousness
In pure consciousness I bear the fruits of spirit
I am the unimaginable hatching of the new
Uncorrupted by desire, artifice
or secret motivation
I am the Sacred Fool
People confuse me with a simpleton
But I am simply the reflected face of all
their projections
If you wish it and are pure
I will share my secret with you
To know me is to raise yourself in the strength of spirit
And resist all that differs from the good
tzolkin.archetype.4.name: L'Initié Serpent de la Sagesse
tzolkin.archetype.4.poem:
I am the Serpent Initiate of Wisdom
Encoded by the Red Serpent
Five is my number, for the fifth force
Is my secret power
I am the dweller of hidden caves
And the temples of the Earth
The lost worlds and the vast ages of the past are
Included in my being
My body is the orbit that consumes
The knowledge of the all-hidden of things
I am the serpent of astral light
The kundalini life force
The source of light and vibration itself
Generator of the red electrical circuit
The mystery of electricity
Is coiled within my being
On my forehead I carry the sign
Of the serpent that creates
The cycles of universal life
The tree of time that turns in both directions
Is the symbol of my wisdom
To know me, you need courage
Who do you think you are
tzolkin.archetype.5.name: Le Hiérophante
tzolkin.archetype.5.poem:
I am the Hierophant
Encoded by the White World-Bridger
Six is my number
The root of the cube
I am the great equalizer
Who restores balance to all worlds
The sacred order of all dimensions
Illuminates my being
For I am the master of the arts of immortality
That every seeker of truth must come to know
Death is the great interdimensional realm of the galaxy
The storehouse of my wisdom
Is the hidden treasure chest free of fear
Expert in the art of bridging worlds
I am the great destroyer of illusion
Stripping away the varnish of conventions
That civilization covers
Unfathomably deep is the degree of my knowledge
I reveal all, but only those who know can see
what I reveal
The rainbow is my crown
Perfect is the order I follow
To know me is to die to your false self
tzolkin.archetype.6.name: L'Avatar
tzolkin.archetype.6.poem:
I am the Avatar
Encoded by the Blue Hand
By the power of seven
I move through your world
Descending from the cosmic heights of the seven heavens
I hold the keys to the seven days of creation
I am the accomplisher, the creator of forms
I am the builder of worlds to come
In interdimensional architecture
I lay the path of knowledge for you to remember
To know, to heal, to accomplish
I also point out these words for you to realize
Through all your actions
For I am the guardian of the covenant
That binds all knowledge for the healing
of the world soul
The code is within my being
An enigma wrapped in mystery
Leaving divine clues
With whom I meet
My mission is to exemplify
What others have not yet known
tzolkin.archetype.7.name: L'Artiste
tzolkin.archetype.7.poem:
I am the Artist
Encoded by the Yellow Star
Eight is the number that opens my door
Resonant frequencies are my palette
To harmonize according
To the deepest impulses of the universe
Dare to be beautiful!
I am the elegance of illumination
Through my art I color your world
I am the rainbow in your day and the
Moonlight glow in your night
I am the Artist
All I do originates in the stars
My name is Star Being, Star Child, Star Singer
I am the galactic chord
Resonated from the cosmic key
I invent the songs and recite the crystal oath
That travel through the infinite zuvuya
Wonders of the ever-expanding harmonics
To know me is to ride the eternal song
Back to the Master Artisan of all Creation
tzolkin.archetype.8.name: Le Guérisseur
tzolkin.archetype.8.poem:
I am the Healer
Encoded by the Red Moon
My number is nine
The power of time, destiny, and the cycles of life
From within the living waters
I merge with the universal flow
Purifying all within my sacred stream
And raising the vibration in every realm of nature
I am the harmony of wholeness
And the regeneration of life
I am liquid and I flow
According to the phases of the Moon
I am the queen of the water that nourishes life
I am the rain and the flowing stream
Feeding the plants and herbs that bloom
In my sacred stream lies the affinity with all
I am crowned by the restoring splendor of leaves,
roots, seeds, and flowers
The supremacy of the divine mind
To know me and my infinite powers of healing
Is to set aside all doubt and enter the stream
of the faithful
tzolkin.archetype.9.name: Le Compatissant
tzolkin.archetype.9.poem:
I am the Compassionate One
Encoded by the White Dog
Ten is my complete number
I am the eternal Comforter — the Loyal
Love is my law
Prudent am I in the ways of empathic knowledge
From my two hands of light
I radiate goodwill to all beings in all realms
I raise my right hand
Palm, open and free — there are no secrets in me
In the absence of fear, there is nothing to hide
All heart — patience and kindness
This is the deepest
All-pervading universal wisdom
Nothing exists that is not
An expression of this all-encompassing love
For love is the manifest
Power of compassion
To know me is to remember that
Love is the light that holds the dream together

zoroastrian.amesha.0.brief: The uncreated creator — pure consciousness from which all Amesha Spentas emanate
zoroastrian.amesha.0.domain: The whole of creation — the supreme creator and source of all good
zoroastrian.amesha.1.brief: The good mind that discerns truth from lie — the first thought of creation
zoroastrian.amesha.1.domain: Animals and the capacity for moral choice
zoroastrian.amesha.2.brief: The cosmic order that sustains reality — truth as the foundation of existence
zoroastrian.amesha.2.domain: Fire and the cosmic order of truth
zoroastrian.amesha.3.brief: The just sovereignty that protects the weak — power in service of truth
zoroastrian.amesha.4.brief: The holy earth mother — devotion that grounds the spirit in sacred matter
zoroastrian.amesha.5.brief: The waters of wholeness — perfection as the natural state of uncorrupted creation
zoroastrian.amesha.6.brief: The immortality inherent in all living things — death is the Lie, not the truth
zoroastrian.festival.0.brief: The new day — creation begins again with the spring equinox
zoroastrian.festival.0.name: Nowruz
zoroastrian.festival.0.practice: Setting the Haft Sin table, jumping over fire, visiting family, wearing new clothes
zoroastrian.festival.0.theme: New Day — rebirth of creation, triumph of light over darkness
zoroastrian.festival.1.brief: First Gahanbar — the sky was created, and the world turns green beneath it
zoroastrian.festival.1.name: Maidyozarem
zoroastrian.festival.1.practice: Seasonal gathering honoring the sky's creation and the greening earth
zoroastrian.festival.1.theme: Mid-spring — the creation of the sky, gratitude for growth
zoroastrian.festival.2.brief: Second Gahanbar — water was created, and the world drinks from its abundance
zoroastrian.festival.2.name: Maidyoshem
zoroastrian.festival.2.practice: Honoring water and its life-giving power at the height of summer
zoroastrian.festival.2.theme: Midsummer — the creation of water, abundance of the longest days
zoroastrian.festival.3.brief: Third Gahanbar — earth was created, and it gives back everything we planted
zoroastrian.festival.3.name: Paitishem
zoroastrian.festival.3.practice: Thanksgiving feast for the harvest, honoring the earth's generosity
zoroastrian.festival.3.theme: Harvest home — the creation of earth, gratitude for the grain
zoroastrian.festival.4.brief: Fourth Gahanbar — plants were created, and the herds return fed and fattened
zoroastrian.festival.4.name: Ayathrem
zoroastrian.festival.4.practice: Celebrating the return of livestock from pasture, honoring vegetation
zoroastrian.festival.4.theme: Return of the herds — the creation of plants, preparation for winter
zoroastrian.festival.5.brief: Fifth Gahanbar — animals were created, and their warmth helps us endure the cold
zoroastrian.festival.5.name: Maidyarem
zoroastrian.festival.5.practice: Honoring animal creation in the deepest cold, community warmth
zoroastrian.festival.5.theme: Midwinter — the creation of animals, endurance through the dark
zoroastrian.festival.6.brief: Sixth Gahanbar — humanity was created last and best, and the ancestors return to bless us
zoroastrian.festival.6.name: Hamaspathmaidyem
zoroastrian.festival.6.practice: The Gatha days: remembering the dead, welcoming ancestor spirits, year-end devotion
zoroastrian.festival.6.theme: All Souls — the creation of humanity, honoring the Fravashis (guardian spirits)
zoroastrian.festival.7.brief: The night of Mithra's birth — the longest darkness before the invincible light returns
zoroastrian.festival.7.name: Yalda
zoroastrian.festival.7.practice: All-night vigil with pomegranates, poetry (Hafez), nuts, and family gathering
zoroastrian.festival.7.theme: Birth of light — the longest night yields to the returning sun
zoroastrian.festival.8.brief: A hundred days before Nowruz — the bonfire that defies winter and promises spring
zoroastrian.festival.8.name: Sadeh
zoroastrian.festival.8.practice: Lighting great bonfires, celebrating fire as the weapon against winter's darkness
zoroastrian.festival.8.theme: The hundredth day — fire against the cold, midwinter warmth
zoroastrian.gatha.0.brief: The prayer that set creation in motion — Ahura Mazda's will made word
zoroastrian.gatha.0.name: Ahunavad
zoroastrian.gatha.0.practice: Recitation of the Ahunavar (Yatha Ahu Vairyo), the most sacred prayer
zoroastrian.gatha.0.theme: The will of the Lord — the Ahunavar prayer, creation's first utterance
zoroastrian.gatha.1.brief: The bliss of Asha — happiness as the natural result of alignment with cosmic truth
zoroastrian.gatha.1.name: Ushtavad
zoroastrian.gatha.1.practice: Meditation on the happiness that comes from living in accordance with truth
zoroastrian.gatha.1.theme: Happiness and bliss through Asha — the joy of righteous living
zoroastrian.gatha.2.brief: The bountiful spirit — Mazda's generosity overflowing into creation
zoroastrian.gatha.2.name: Spentamad
zoroastrian.gatha.2.practice: Devotional practice honoring the bountiful (Spenta) quality of the divine
zoroastrian.gatha.2.theme: Holy wisdom and devotion — the bountiful spirit of Mazda
zoroastrian.gatha.3.brief: The good kingdom — when truth rules, the world becomes paradise (Frashokereti)
zoroastrian.gatha.3.name: Vohukhshathra
zoroastrian.gatha.3.practice: Reflection on the ideal governance of truth over lie
zoroastrian.gatha.3.theme: Good dominion — righteous power and the kingdom of truth
zoroastrian.gatha.4.brief: The highest wish — the year ends with a prayer for the renovation of all existence
zoroastrian.gatha.4.name: Vahishtoisht
zoroastrian.gatha.4.practice: The culminating devotion of the year, anticipating the world's renewal
zoroastrian.gatha.4.theme: The highest prayer — the final Gatha, pointing toward renovation
